//: Sunburst TV — the FICTIONAL example brand that ships with the repo. It exists to demo and test white-label packaging (tools/brand.mjs); real operator brand dirs live OUTSIDE the repo and follow the same layout. panelPubKey stays a placeholder here: point it at your panel (or build with --dev to borrow the local gitignored dev config). Brand descriptors must never carry credentials — tools/brand.mjs rejects a dev block.
name: Sunburst TV
